evals.prompt: Swap the Q and W keys on the base layer
evals.expected_output: Positions 1 and 2 on default_layer are exchanged: &kp W at pos 1, &kp Q at pos 2
assertions: default_layer row 0 now has &kp W before &kp Q
All other bindings in default_layer are unchanged

evals.prompt: Add home row mods with GACS order to the default layer
evals.expected_output: Home row keys A/S/D/F and J/K/L/; are wrapped in &mt with GUI/ALT/CTRL/SHIFT modifiers

evals.prompt: Add a navigation layer with arrow keys on HJKL and Home/End/PgUp/PgDn on the left hand
evals.expected_output: A new layer (index 4) is added with arrow keys and navigation, and a layer-switch key is wired in
assertions: A new layer block exists with LEFT/DOWN/UP/RIGHT on positions 19-22
HOME/PG_DN/PG_UP/END are placed on the left hand
An &mo or &tog for the new layer is added to an existing layer

evals.prompt: What does the left thumb cluster do on the base layer?
evals.expected_output: Description of the three left thumb keys: right-click, Ctrl/Enter (mod-tap), and momentary layer 1 (NUMBER)
assertions: Position 36 (&mkp RCLK) is identified as right mouse click
Position 37 (&mt LCTRL RETURN) is identified as Ctrl on hold, Enter on tap
Position 38 (&mo 1) is identified as momentary NUMBER layer

evals.prompt: Add a combo so pressing J+K together types Escape
evals.expected_output: A combos node is added with a combo binding for positions 19+20 that outputs ESC
assertions: A combos block exists inside the root / block
The combo is outside the keymap node
